---
title: "Nicholas A. Jensen"
subtitle: "Curriculum Vitae"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 2
    filters:
      - templates/cv-filter.lua
  pdf:
    documentclass: scrartcl
    geometry:
      - top=1in
      - bottom=1in
      - left=1in
      - right=1in
    mainfont: "Times New Roman"
    fontsize: 12pt
    include-in-header: templates/cv-header.tex
    colorlinks: true
    filters:
      - templates/cv-filter.lua
---

::: {.content-visible when-format="html"}
[Download CV as PDF](cv.pdf){.btn .btn-primary}
:::

::: {.cv-contact}
[Stephenson Institute for Classical Liberalism]{.cv-left} [Phone: (+1) 205-362-0487]{.cv-right}
:::

::: {.cv-contact}
[Wabash College]{.cv-left} [Institutional Email: [jensenn@wabash.edu](mailto:jensenn@wabash.edu)]{.cv-right}
:::

::: {.cv-contact}
[5825 Sunset Way Apt 2312, Whitestown, IN 46075]{.cv-left} [Personal Email: [nicholasjensen414@gmail.com](mailto:nicholasjensen414@gmail.com)]{.cv-right}
:::

::: {.cv-contact}
[]{.cv-left} [Website: [nicholas-jensen.com](https://nicholas-jensen.com/)]{.cv-right}
:::

::: {.cv-contact}
[]{.cv-left} [ORCID: [0009-0004-1858-3803](https://orcid.org/0009-0004-1858-3803)]{.cv-right}
:::

## Education

::: {.cv-entry}
**Ph.D., Economics**, Middle Tennessee State University, Murfreesboro, TN

[August 2025]{.date}
:::

::: {.cv-entry}
**M.A., Economics**, Troy University, Troy, AL

[2021]{.date}
:::

::: {.cv-entry}
**B.S., Economics**, Troy University, Troy, AL

[2019]{.date}
:::

## Academic Employment

::: {.cv-entry}
**Post-doctoral Scholar-in-Residence**

[July 2025 -- Present]{.date}
:::

::: {.cv-detail}
Stephenson Institute for Classical Liberalism, Wabash College
:::

::: {.cv-entry}
**Visiting Lecturer in Economics**

[January 2025 -- July 2025]{.date}
:::

::: {.cv-detail}
Maryville College, Social Sciences Division
:::

::: {.cv-entry}
**Graduate Teaching & Research Assistant**

[2021 -- 2024]{.date}
:::

::: {.cv-detail}
Middle Tennessee State University, Economics Dept.
:::

::: {.cv-entry}
**Graduate Teaching Assistant**

[2019 -- 2021]{.date}
:::

::: {.cv-detail}
Troy University, Economics Dept.
:::

## Research

### Journal Articles

- D'Andrea, F. A. M. C., Vaca Pereira Rocha, H., Jensen, N., Blizard, Z., & Melo, V. (2026). "Economic Freedom and Rent Seeking: Evidence from US States." *Public Choice*. [doi: 10.1007/s11127-026-01386-6](https://doi.org/10.1007/s11127-026-01386-6)

- Benzecry, G. F., Jensen, N., & Smith, D. J. (2025). "The Road to Serfdom and the Definitions of Socialism, Planning, and the Welfare State During the First Half of the 20th Century." *History of Political Economy*, 57(3), 441--475. [doi: 10.1215/00182702-11773500](https://doi.org/10.1215/00182702-11773500)

- Benzecry, G. F., Jensen, N., & Smith, D. J. (2025). "The Socialists' Hypotheses and *The Road to Serfdom*." *Journal of the History of Economic Thought*, 47(3), 291--316. [doi: 10.1017/S1053837224000336](https://doi.org/10.1017/S1053837224000336)

### Book Chapters

- Benzecry, G. F., & Jensen, N. A. (2025). "Mises: The Disutility of Labor." In G. Callahan (Ed.), *The Concept of Work in the History of European Philosophy*. Palgrave Studies in Classical Liberalism. Palgrave Macmillan. [doi: 10.1007/978-3-031-96547-0_14](https://doi.org/10.1007/978-3-031-96547-0_14)

### Under Review

- "Regulatory Rollback and the Smoking Tailpipe: Air-Quality Effects of Repealing Vehicle Emissions Testing" (with Patricia J. Hummel and Nicholas Reinarts), at *Journal of Regulatory Economics* | [Preprint](https://www.researchsquare.com/article/rs-8753461/latest)

### Working Papers

- "The Effects of Prosecutor Turnover on Criminal Case Outcomes"
- "Electoral Pressure and the Shadow of Trial: Prosecutors and Jury Mobilization" (with Joshua Ammons)

<!-- ### Works in Progress -->

## Professional Activities and Achievements

### Presentations

::: {.cv-entry}
Southern Economic Association Annual Conference, Washington, D.C.

[November 22-25, 2024]{.date}
:::

::: {.cv-entry}
American Law & Economics Association 34th Annual Meeting, Ann Arbor, MI

[May 17-18, 2024]{.date}
:::

::: {.cv-entry}
Association of Private Enterprise Education Annual Meeting, Las Vegas, NV

[April 7-9, 2024]{.date}
:::

::: {.cv-entry}
Southern Economic Association 93rd Annual Conference, New Orleans, LA

[November 20, 2023]{.date}
:::

<!-- ### Invited Talks

::: {.cv-entry}
A Statewide Analysis of All Crime Offenses During COVID. Annual Conference for Criminal Justice Educators

[June 2023]{.date}
::: -->

### Colloquia, Conferences and Workshops

::: {.cv-entry}
2025 Seminar and Conference on Voluntary Governance (University of Buckingham)

[September 4-7, 2025]{.date}
:::

::: {.cv-entry}
Politics, Philosophy, and Economics Workshop (Chapman University)

[July 2024]{.date}
:::

::: {.cv-entry}
Causal Inference I Workshop with Scott Cunningham

[February 2024]{.date}
:::

::: {.cv-entry}
Regression Discontinuity Workshop with Rocio Titiunik

[May 2023]{.date}
:::

::: {.cv-entry}
Causal Inference II Workshop with Scott Cunningham

[March 2023]{.date}
:::

### Awards, Honors, and Grants

::: {.cv-entry}
Hayek Fund for Scholars

[2024]{.date}
:::

::: {.cv-entry}
APEE Young Scholar's Award

[2024]{.date}
:::

::: {.cv-entry}
Mercatus Frederic Bastiat Fellowship, Mercatus Center

[2023 -- 2024]{.date}
:::

::: {.cv-entry}
Political Economy Research Institute Fellowship

[2021 -- Present]{.date}
:::

::: {.cv-detail}
Middle Tennessee State University
:::

::: {.cv-entry}
Johnson Center Masters in Economics Assistantship

[2019 -- 2021]{.date}
:::

::: {.cv-detail}
Troy University
:::

::: {.cv-entry}
Sorrell College of Business Undergraduate Research Showcase, 3rd Place - Economics

[2018]{.date}
:::

::: {.cv-detail}
Troy University
:::

::: {.cv-entry}
Chancellor's Scholarship, Troy University

[2014 -- 2019]{.date}
:::

## Teaching Experience

### Maryville College --- Visiting Lecturer

::: {.cv-entry}
ECN 210 Principles of Economics

[Spring 2025]{.date}
:::

::: {.cv-entry}
ECN 332-01 & ECN 332-02 Money & Banking

[Spring 2025]{.date}
:::

::: {.cv-entry}
STA 120 Introductory Statistics

[Summer 2025]{.date}
:::

### Middle Tennessee State University --- Instructor

::: {.cv-entry}
ECON 2410 Principles of Macroeconomics

[Fall 2023]{.date}
:::

::: {.cv-detail}
Instructor evaluation: 3.98 / 5.0 (25 students, in-person class)
:::

::: {.cv-entry}
ECON 2410 Principles of Macroeconomics

[Spring 2024]{.date}
:::

::: {.cv-detail}
Instructor evaluation: 4.05 / 5.0 (43 students, in-person class)
:::

::: {.cv-entry}
ECON 2420 Principles of Microeconomics

[Fall 2024]{.date}
:::

### Troy University --- Graduate Teaching Assistant

::: {.cv-entry}
ECON 4451 Economics of Globalization

[Spring 2021]{.date}
:::

::: {.cv-entry}
ECON 2252 Principles of Microeconomics

[Fall 2019, Fall 2020]{.date}
:::

## Media Appearances

- ["Surge in Gas Prices Strains East Tennessee Food Trucks."](https://www.wbir.com/video/money/business/small-business/surge-in-gas-prices-strains-east-tennessee-food-trucks/51-ef328fce-5f04-43a9-938e-2ad28b957694) *WBIR 10 News*, March 26, 2026.

- ["Knoxville Ranks Low on Rent Affordability."](https://www.wate.com/news/top-stories/knoxville-ranks-low-on-rent-affordability/) *WATE 6 News*, April 22, 2025.

- ["Area Experts Warn Against Potential Price Highs, Supply Lows."](https://www.thedailytimes.com/news/area-experts-warn-against-potential-price-highs-supply-lows/article_912776a7-3d29-4ce6-8068-0278718bce4f.html) *The Daily Times*, April 5, 2025.

- ["Knoxville Boutique Owner Braces for Possible Price Hikes as Tariffs Loom."](https://www.wbir.com/article/news/local/knoxville-boutique-owner-braces-for-possible-price-hikes-from-tariffs/51-78ea28af-3b51-4f6a-8d61-be792a69f688) *WBIR 10 News*, 2025.

## References

*Available upon request.*
